# seerr_sonarr_server (Data Source)

Read a Seerr Sonarr server configuration via /api/v1/settings/sonarr.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_sonarr_server" "shows" {
  server_id = 1
}

output "sonarr_server_json" {
  value = data.seerr_sonarr_server.shows.response_json
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_id` (Number) The numeric ID of the Sonarr server to look up.

### Read-Only

- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body for the matched server.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
